cast.name: 罗姆尼·威廉姆斯 Romney Williams
阿尔贝托·弗拉斯卡 Alberto Frasca
毛里齐奥·贝戈蒂 Maurizio Begotti
菲利波·坦佩斯蒂 Filippo Tempesti

introduction: The almost teenage Sandro and his younger brother Giannino are on holiday with their family on a private island. Here the stories of the two children intertwine with those of the other families' children. The young protagonists are almost left to their own devices by the adults, who are only framed from the shoulders down and only appear at times such as lunch or to send their children to bed. their children to bed. Sandro will have his first approach to sexuality on the island, when he meets the young Patrizia
